title: Sharing peer-review-ready pilot white paper (prostate molecular health)
body:
On behalf of its authors, we are requesting permission to share a **pilot white paper** and 2-page visual summary on **molecular changes** observed after intraprostatic ozone therapy, tracked by the **PSE** blood test.

Results: **\~31% mean PSE reduction**, **80%** improved, **\~20% PSA** decrease over **30 days** (n=10; outlier excluded). *Figures show clear pre- vs. post-clustering (LDA).*

The post is **educational (no medical advice, no selling)**.

More information:[ https://doctorsstudio.com/ozone-therapy-for-prostate-health-study/](https://doctorsstudio.com/ozone-therapy-for-prostate-health-study/)
